hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in *.json) jq . "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo 'JSON invalid: '"$f" >&2 ;; *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs) pnpm exec biome check --no-errors-on-unmatched "$f" 2>&1 | head -40 ;; esac

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); case "$cmd" in *'git fetch'*|*'git pull'*) br=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); up=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref @{upstream} 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$up" ]; then ah=$(git rev-list --count $up..HEAD 2>/dev/null); be=$(git rev-list --count HEAD..$up 2>/dev/null); if [ "${ah:-0}" -gt 0 ] || [ "${be:-0}" -gt 0 ]; then echo "branch-delta: $br vs $up — ahead $ah / behind $be" >&2; if [ "${be:-0}" -gt 0 ]; then authors=$(git log --format='%an' HEAD..$up 2>/dev/null | sort -u | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//'); echo "  upstream authors: $authors" >&2; fi; fi; fi ;; esac
